summary: Tested Phase 2 (simplified round-robin matchmaking) and Phase 3 (tabbed AI summaries with fallback) features. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Paper Detail page correctly shows legacy impact_summary fallback since no papers have pre-generated 'summaries' field yet.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with status=ok
GET /api/status returns scheduler status with all categories shown as paused
GET /api/leaderboard?category=cs.RO returns 8 papers (this week), 135 total, 6142 matches
GET /api/leaderboard works with all period filters (all, recent, week, month)
GET /api/leaderboard works for all categories (cs.DC, econ.GN, physics.comp-ph, q-bio.BM)
GET /api/papers/{id} returns paper with stats, matches, confidence interval
GET /api/papers/{id} returns 404 for invalid paper ID
Paper detail includes 'impact_summary' field (legacy fallback)
Paper detail does NOT include 'summaries' field (pre-gen not done yet)
GET /api/prompts returns both evaluation and summary prompts
GET /api/convergence?category=cs.RO returns convergence curve with Spearman/Kendall/Pearson correlations
Convergence shows ranking stability progressing from Spearman 0.90 to 0.999
GET /api/model-correlation returns model correlation data for 3 models
GET /api/categories returns active categories list
GET /api/tags returns all category tags with counts
Frontend Leaderboard page loads with 8 papers, shows ranks, scores, win rates
Paper Detail page shows: header, abstract, categories, stats, confidence interval, comparison history
Paper Detail page shows legacy 'AI IMPACT ASSESSMENT' (not tabbed) because no pre-gen summaries exist
Paper Detail shows 47 match items with model badges (claude-opus, gpt-5.2, gemini-3)
Model Analysis page shows rank correlations (Spearman 0.51-0.56) and pairwise agreement (56-58%)
Validation page shows multiple datasets with agreement by domain
Methodology page explains round-robin rotation and convergence goals
critical_code_review_comments: PaperPage.jsx correctly handles fallback: shows tabbed summaries if 'summaries' field exists, else shows legacy 'impact_summary'
The _select_pairs function in scheduler.py implements simplified round-robin with Phase 0 (top-K cross-matches), Phase 1 (deficit papers), Phase 2 (general round-robin)
_check_goals_met uses Spearman's Rho correctly with scipy.stats.spearmanr for ranking stability
TOURNAMENT_MODELS in config.py correctly defines the 3 models: GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, Gemini 3 Pro
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 and Phase 3 features working. Papers currently do NOT have 'summaries' field - only 'impact_summary'. The tabbed summaries UI (Claude/Gemini/GPT tabs) will only appear once papers have pre-generated summaries via _generate_paper_summaries(). Current behavior correctly shows legacy fallback. Tournament is paused across all 10 categories. Match distribution is balanced (round-robin working). Convergence shows Spearman ρ > 0.95 indicating stable rankings.

phase2_round_robin.implementation: _select_pairs with 3 phases: top-K cross-matches, deficit papers, general round-robin

phase3_tabbed_summaries.tabbed_ui: Shows tabs for Claude/Gemini/GPT when 'summaries' field exists
phase3_tabbed_summaries.fallback: Shows legacy 'impact_summary' when no pre-gen summaries
phase3_tabbed_summaries.current_state: Fallback active - no papers have 'summaries' field yet

api_endpoints./api/papers/{id}: OK - returns paper detail with stats and matches
api_endpoints./api/prompts: OK - returns evaluation and summary prompts
